intro: Psydrax odoratissima, also known as Psydrax esirensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally used in African folk medicine, Psydrax esirensis has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
